entries.title: scrollbar overlapping navigation bar on app list
toggle between floating and classic navigation bar
wire commit URLs in WhatsNew entries
remove verbose logging toggle
entries.description: Debug log calls happen inside hook callbacks that fire under mGlobalLock, where reading prefs would deadlock.

entries.title: clarify relock delay labels
race condition in skip-version check and polish changelog sheet
entries.description: Read dismissed version synchronously from SharedPreferences instead of the reactive Flow to prevent the auto-popup from ignoring a skipped version on cold start. Also pins action buttons outside the scroll area, removes tap-to-collapse on descriptions, and moves commit links to long-press.

entries.title: polish update sheet transitions and interactions
entries.description: Status states morph from the loading indicator instead of snapping in, auto-popup skips the artificial delay, entries start expanded, commit links move to long-press, and Later becomes Skip this version.

entries.title: use ETag conditional requests for GitHub API calls
entries.description: 304 Not Modified responses don't count against the rate limit, so repeated update checks are essentially free.

entries.title: bundle changelog as APK asset for WhatsNew
entries.description: WhatsNew reads from a build-time bundled asset instead of fetching remotely, so it always has entries for the installed version. The remote CHANGELOG.json now keeps the last 5 releases and ChangelogSheet filters by the target version.

entries.title: enable auto-check updates by default
rename Lock section to Lock & privacy on app detail screen
move secure display into lock group on app detail screen
auto-show update sheet when a new version is found
entries.description: Auto-check now fires on every app foreground via repeatOnLifecycle. When it finds a newer version, the update sheet opens automatically and the Settings tab shows a badge.

entries.title: overhaul changelog/update sheet and state model
entries.description: Error and rate-limit states render a centered cookie badge instead of a flat card.

entries.title: replace changelog type labels with M3 color-coded chips
entries.description: Each entry now shows a squared, uppercase chip tinted by change type using Material You roles, plus a separate muted scope chip.

entries.title: redesign update sheet with cookie badge and morph transition
entries.description: Loading spinner crossfades into a cookie-shaped badge when the check finishes, button stays disabled during fetch, and the sheet title is now consistent across states.

entries.title: hide changelog items in update sheet when up to date
animate floating toolbar visibility on navigation
add experimental notice and fix status card wording
remove broken Binder UID check from BiometricAuthActivity
entries.description: Binder.getCallingUid() in onCreate returns the process's own UID, not the launcher's, so it always rejected the launch. The auth token is the real security gate.
